title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Exide Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
